debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0..Real.pi, sin x * f (cos x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in -1..1, f y

failed_attempts:
have h1 : cos 0 = 1 := cos_zero
  have h2 : cos π = -1 := cos_pi
  rw [← h1, ← h2]
  have hderiv : ∀ x ∈ [[0, π]], HasDerivAt cos (-sin x) x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x
  have hcont : ContinuousOn sin [[0, π]] := continuous_sin.continuousOn
  rw [← integral_comp_mul_deriv_Ioo hderiv hcont (fun _ _ => trivial)]
  simp only [neg_neg]
  congr 1
  ext x
  ring

have h1 : ∫ x in 0..π, sin x * f (cos x) = ∫ x in 0..π, -(- sin x) * f (cos x) := by ring_nf
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : ∫ x in (0)..π, -(-sin x) * f (cos x) = -∫ x in (0)..π, (-sin x) * f (cos x) := by
    simp only [neg_mul, neg_neg, integral_neg]
  rw [h2]
  rw [← intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x => cos x) (fun x => -sin x)]
  · simp only [cos_zero, cos_pi, neg_neg]
  · intro x _
    exact hasDerivAt_cos x
  · exact continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn
  · exact fun x _ => ContinuousAt.continuousWithinAt (Continuous.continuousAt (continuous_const.mul (Continuous.comp' (by fun_prop) continuous_cos)))
